name: Marketing Audit Checklist
description: Marketing Audit Checklist - Marketing template for strategy professionals
instructions:
How to Use This Template Step What to Do 1. Go to Audit Checklist Open the 'Audit Checklist' tab. You will find 10 marketing categories, each with 5 specific checkpoints — 50 items total. 2. Score each item For each checkpoint, enter a score from 1 to 5 in the Score column:
1 = Not started / Not in place
2 = Basic / Needs major improvement
3 = Functional / Adequate
4 = Good / Well-executed
5 = Excellent / Best-in-class 3. Set Priority Use the Priority column to mark each item as High, Medium, or Low. This helps you focus your action plan. 4. Add Notes The Notes column is for your specific obse
